policy: one pruning issue per manifest canonical route
decisionRule: Keep seed/backlog and variant routes non-canonical until they prove reusable DSK pressure through resources, events, methods, snapshots, descriptors, smoke coverage, and deterministic replay direction.

variantsToFold.reason: Keep salvage/cargo pressure as seed-backlog until cargo, vehicle/contact, and pressure replay boundaries can be tested without a separate route museum entry.
Fold tether-repair pressure into the traversal/cargo DSK backlog unless it creates a distinct reusable tether/contact boundary.
Rail/lane traversal should become checkpoint, route-pressure, or vehicle/contact kit pressure before becoming canonical.
Courier delivery fantasy should fold into the delivery/extraction loop until cargo-ledger replay makes it uniquely reusable.

manifestDocsUpdates: Keep `next-ledge` as the manifest-owned route-checkpoint/action-input canonical route.
Document cargo/salvage/tether variants as seed-backlog until delivery/extraction replay exists.
canonicalRouteIssues.portfolioEffect: One canonical traversal route can pressure route/checkpoint/action-input boundaries while cargo variants wait for stronger delivery/extraction DSK proof.

variantsToFold.reason: Cartographer scan/beacon fantasy should fold into survey-pressure fixtures until it proves a reusable survey boundary beyond Fogline Relay.
Reef survey variance should stay seed-backlog unless underwater/resource pressure creates reusable DSK pressure.
Grave/landmark survey variance should contribute descriptors and replay expectations instead of a separate canonical route.
Drone survey pressure should wait for agent-group plus scan-zone replay before canonical promotion.

manifestDocsUpdates: Keep `fogline-relay` as the survey-pressure canonical route.
Record cartographer/drone variants as survey-pressure backlog until scan-zone-hazard replay differentiates them.
canonicalRouteIssues.portfolioEffect: Fogline Relay can represent scan, zone, timed pressure, and hazard boundaries without multiplying cartographer route variants.

variantsToFold.reason: Meadow presentation and biome cutover should remain renderer/preset validation unless it proves a reusable field-engineer gameplay boundary.
Agent lab behavior should stay a harness/backlog lane until agent memory and dialogue expose rendererless DSK resources/events/snapshots.

manifestDocsUpdates: Keep Signal Isles as the broad kit-utilization showcase, not a sink for every field-sim variant.
Document presentation/agent variants as non-canonical until they own clear reusable DSK boundaries.
localJsToMoveIntoProtoKits: debug/replay scenario metadata for composed kit routes
canonicalRouteIssues.portfolioEffect: Signal Isles remains the one canonical composition showcase while presentation-only and agent-harness routes stay outside the canonical count.

variantsToFold.reason: The harness should feed aerial traversal, terrain-window, and camera descriptor expectations into the base Sora canonical route before becoming separate.
Open-world flight variance should collapse into a higher-level aerial traversal domain above flight feel, terrain windows, and checkpoints.
Race/checkpoint speed variance should stay backlog unless vehicle/contact physics creates a separate reusable route boundary.

manifestDocsUpdates: Keep `sora-the-infinite` as the aerial traversal canonical route.
Fold Open Above harness findings into Sora route docs, camera descriptors, and replay expectations before adding another canonical flight route.
canonicalRouteIssues.portfolioEffect: One canonical aerial route keeps the portfolio from splitting into multiple flight-feel variants before the aerial traversal DSK is clear.

variantsToFold.reason: Warden survival pressure should feed horde/resource/hazard fixtures before becoming a separate canonical route.
Beetle siege variance should fold into survival ecology unless it proves a distinct agent-ecology DSK.
Cavern hazard/resource pressure should stay seed-backlog until survival ecology replay needs a separate terrain/resource route.

manifestDocsUpdates: Keep `zombie-orchard` as the survival/horde canonical route.
Treat warden, beetle, and cavern variants as survival-ecology backlog until replay proves a separate reusable boundary.
canonicalRouteIssues.portfolioEffect: Zombie Orchard keeps survival pressure visible while adjacent horde fantasies fold into reusable survival-ecology tests.

variantsToFold.reason: Bastion/sealing tower-defense variance should become defense map, economy, build-placement, wave/agent, combat, and descriptor DSK pressure first.
Mech defense presentation should fold into strategic pressure unless unit-control/combat creates a separate reusable boundary.
Factory defense/resource timing should stay backlog until the strategic pressure loop needs production/economy replay as a reusable boundary.

manifestDocsUpdates: Keep `signal-bastion` as the strategic/tower-defense canonical route.
Point new defense variants at generic-defense DSK aliases instead of adding V1/V2/V3 route forks.
localJsToMoveIntoProtoKits: wave/agent director and combat resolver descriptors
canonicalRouteIssues.portfolioEffect: Signal Bastion anchors strategic pressure so defense variants become DSK alias pressure instead of extra canonical routes.

variantsToFold.reason: Dungeon/action relay pressure should feed route-checkpoint, resource, hazard, and extraction DSK tests before separate promotion.
Dockyard build/defense/cargo pressure should remain a future extraction/logistics candidate until replay distinguishes it from Hellscape Siege.

manifestDocsUpdates: Keep `rogue-lite-hellscape-siege` as the unified base route for action, harvesting, building, and wave defense.
Preserve the removed legacy V2 path note until tests prove the base route owns the folded behavior.
canonicalRouteIssues.portfolioEffect: The unified Hellscape route prevents V2 route sprawl while keeping action-defense-extraction pressure available for future reusable kits.
